nasb.text: Then he said to another, ‘And how much do you owe?’ And he said, ‘A hundred measures of wheat.’ He *said to him, ‘Take your bill, and write eighty.’

esv.text: Then he said to another, ‘And how much do you owe?’ He said, ‘A hundred measures  of wheat.’ He said to him, ‘Take your bill, and write eighty.’

cnv.text: 又問一個說：‘你欠多少？’他說：‘四萬公升麥子。’管家說：‘拿你的欠單去，寫三萬。’

ccb.text: “管家又问另一个，‘你欠多少？’ “他回答说，‘一百石麦子。’ “管家说，‘这是你的帐，改成八十石吧。’

csbs.text: “他问另一个说：‘你呢，你欠多少？’ “他说：‘一百担    麦子。’ “管家说：‘拿你的欠条，写成八十。’
